_comment: Adapter for Nginx/Apache Combined Access Log format. Uses 'apache' parser — no field_mappings needed for standard fields.
_note_limitations: Nginx access logs do not contain source/target service names or resource metrics. Kendra sets static service values from derived_fields. For multi-service setups, use one adapter config per service log file.
_note_latency: Nginx logs request time in seconds (e.g., 0.342). Kendra auto-detects and converts to milliseconds.
